validations.summary: /// Execute the evaluations one by one and build up the list of failures. /// A list of business rule failure. ///
/// Execute the evaluations one by one and build up the list of failures. /// A list of business rule failure. ///

validations.conditions: Patient != null | Patient.PostalAddress != null | Patient.ResidentialAddress != null

validations.summary: /// Check that everything to do with completing the objective as defined by /// PatientDetailedInformation is fulfilled. The PersonDetailsEvaluator will /// check for the absence of addresses, whilst the AddressEvaluator /// will check the actual contents of the address. ///
/// Validates that if a dependant code is required there is one present. ///
validations.conditions: context != null && context.Coding != null && context.Coding.CodeSets.Count > 0 && context.Patient.DateOfBirth.HasValue && context.Preadmission.ExpectedAdmissionDate.HasValue && context.Patient.GenderTypeId.HasValue

validations.summary: /// Validates ICD codes against the age of patient and gender. ///
validations.conditions: ageInMonthsAtAdmission.HasValue && genderType.HasValue | icdCodes.Count > 0 | (int | (int | ageInMonthsAtAdmission.Value < icd.MinAgeInMonths || ageInMonthsAtAdmission.Value > icd.MaxAgeInMonths

validations.summary: /// Validates CPT codes against the age of patient and gender. ///
validations.conditions: ageInMonthsAtAdmission.HasValue && genderType.HasValue | cptCodes.Count > 0 | (int | (int | ageInMonthsAtAdmission.Value < cpt.MinAgeInMonths || ageInMonthsAtAdmission.Value > cpt.MaxAgeInMonths

context.SelectedAdmitting == null | !context.SelfReferring && context.SelectedReferring == null | context.SelectedAdmitting != null && context.SelectedReferring != null && context.SelectedAdmitting.PractitionerIdentifier.CompareTo(context.SelectedReferring.PractitionerIdentifier | context.SelfReferringTypeId == null && context.SelfReferring && isSelfReferralEnabled | context.SelfReferringTypeId == (int | context.SelectedFamilyGP == null && context.HasNoFamilyGP == false

validations.summary: /// Validates the unverified auth does not exist. ///
validations.conditions: context != null && context.Preadmission != null && context.Preadmission.MedicalAidDetails != null && context.Preadmission.MedicalAidDetails.MemberSchemeId != null && (context.Preadmission.MedicalAidDetails as IAuthorisationPlaceholderDetails | !string.IsNullOrEmpty(authorisationNumber | context.AuthorisationStatus == null || (context.AuthorisationStatus.AuthorisationStatusType == AuthorisationStatusTypeCodeData.UnverifiedManualAuthorisation && context.AuthorisationStatus.AuthorisationNumber != authorisationNumber | negotiation != null

validations.summary: /// Validates if benefit limit is supplied. ///
validations.conditions: context != null && context.Preadmission != null && context.Preadmission.HasMedicalAidDetails && context.Preadmission.MedicalAidDetails.MemberSchemeId.HasValue | context.Preadmission.MedicalAidDetails.MemberPlanId.HasValue | fundingRule != null && fundingRule.AuthorisationFundingStrategyId == (int

validations.summary: /// Validates if LOC and LOS is supplied. ///
validations.conditions: context != null && context.Preadmission != null && context.Preadmission.HasMedicalAidDetails && context.Preadmission.MedicalAidDetails.MemberSchemeId.HasValue | context.Preadmission.MedicalAidDetails.MemberPlanId.HasValue | fundingRule != null && fundingRule.AuthorisationFundingStrategyId == (int
identifier != null | !ValidateSAID(identifier.IdentifierValue | identifier.IdentifierValue != null | splitDOBFromSAID != Convert.ToInt32(dateofBirth

person != null && HasMatches(person | person.IsNew && person.HasSufficientIdentity(new IdentifierTypeCodeData[] { IdentifierTypeCodeData.IdNumber } | !person.IsNew // if an existing 'soft' duplicate (same name, surname, dob | id.IsNewObject

context != null && context.Preadmission != null && context.Preadmission.GuarantorType == GuarantorTypeCodeData.OtherPerson && context.Guarantor != null && HasMatches(context.Guarantor | context.Guarantor.IsNew
